trans-unit.source: Manage your workspace details and configuration

Incoming WhatsApp/Meta events and outgoing webhook deliveries draw from the same workspace quota. High bidirectional traffic will exhaust the budget faster — consider upgrading your plan if you see delivery failures or 429 errors.
Permanently delete this workspace and all its data
Add a description for this workspace
Manage your plans, subscriptions, and usage
No plans yet. Click "Create Plan" to add one.
Token used to verify webhook endpoint
Manage your WhatsApp Business API phone numbers and settings
Upload new messages using a file. Only template messages can initiate a conversation (lasting 24 hours). If you attempt to send another type of message, it may take too long and result in an error.

Upload a JSON file containing message specifications. The JSON should be an array of objects similar to the sender_data used to send raw messages. Copy a sender_data object from the templates section to create a new message.
Upload a CSV file with message specifications. Download the CSV template to complete it in the templates section.

x.equiv-text: <svg class="h-4 w-4" [class.animate-spin]=" syncingSubscriptionId === sub.id " xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" >

trans-unit.source: Get started by adding your first WhatsApp Business phone number
Only active phone configurations can send and receive messages
A friendly name to identify this phone configuration

Each verified POST from WhatsApp/Meta to this phone config's webhook URL counts against your workspace throughput quota. If the quota is exceeded, Meta receives a 429 and will retry according to its own retry policy.
Long-lived access token from Meta Business
Your payment was not completed. You can try again at any time.
Create a subscription for a user without going through checkout.
This will deregister your phone number from WhatsApp Cloud API.
Configure how much each endpoint counts toward throughput limits.
Copy data to send message as raw
Update your workspace name, slug, and description
Download CSV data to fill and add messages to campaign
Payment is being processed. If you completed checkout, click "Check payment status" to confirm.
Rate limit reached. Try again in

"None" means that will not track messages read. "Server" means that will track messages read at the server, synched with other users. "Local" means that will track messages read only in your session locally.
Defines where your message read will be registered. Used to track messages you didn't read yet.
Leave fields blank to keep current values
Throughput is shared across all webhook activity.
Shared budget across workspace members. Charged first; cascades to user budget when exhausted.
Manage plans, manual subscriptions, and endpoint weights
Please verify your email to continue.

Each outgoing delivery attempt counts against your workspace quota. Deliveries blocked by a quota limit are retried with exponential backoff and may reach dead-letter — inspect the logs below for quota errors.
All credential fields are required for new configurations
Enter your email to receive a reset link
Move message type selection up / down
Campaigns are available to supporters. Visit the supporter area to learn more.
Automations are available to supporters. Visit the supporter area to learn more.
Choose how message read status is tracked
Automatically mark messages as read when viewed
Send typing notifications to users when composing messages
End your current session and return to login
Connect a new WhatsApp Business phone number
Manage your profile and application preferences
Throughput billing applies to this webhook.
Budget for your personal account. Used directly or as fallback when a workspace budget runs out.
Your subscription has been activated. It may take a few moments to reflect in your account.
Select media types to preview automatically
